channel.title: Condensed MatterЁЯНй + AIЁЯдЦ Journal ClubЁЯОУ
channel.description: Lecture notes from the condensed matter theory journal club organized by Yiyang Jiang at Penn State.

item.title: Topological Insulators and the BulkтАУBoundary Correspondence
item.author: yzj5306@psu.edu (Yiyang Jiang)
item.description:
Presenter Yiyang Jiang
Date June 30, 2026
Venue Topology Seminar
Notes Typeset & handwritten versions below

These notes build the bulkтАУboundary correspondence of topological band insulators from the ground up тАФ from the modern theory of polarization to the protected edge spectrum and the wider topological zoo. Both the typeset write-up and the original handwritten notes are attached below.
